title: an ATOMIC negator token in a fixed jamo-BPE codec CAUSES held-out negation recombination — one variable (encoder span policy: atomic vs shattered), same vocab/corpus/model/seed; predicted Δd_acc ≥ 0.15 on an OOD panel whose control sits near 0.5
verdict: FALSIFIED 2026-07-16 — F1 Δd_acc(A-atom−A-shat) = −0.1146 (s0) / +0.0468 (s1), both < 0.05 DEAD floor; measurement CLEAN (F2 liveness 0.8594 both · F6 placebo gap ≤0.05 · C-scaf≈0.5 · C-perm in-band). Atomicity carries no held-out-recombination advantage under a fixed codec; v1's salvage.L4 attribution does not survive isolation (mech-3 dies a 4th way, cleanly)

title: the per-edge parse-disagreement FIELD T (L→R vs R→L parser) — as a field, NOT its rank-1 scalar summary — CAUSES held-out honorific-binding resolution; one variable = post-parse tension policy (full T vs rank-1 T), predicted Δd_acc ≥ 0.15 on a HON-BIND panel whose heuristics sit at 0.5
verdict: 🟢 SUPPORTED 2026-07-17 (free-slot d_acc, d=384 ×2seed ×5arm drill4000). F1 Δ(A-duel−A-rank1)=0.3789/0.3802 ≥0.15 both; F4 offtop 0.6467/0.6963 ≥0.20 (high-rank field, not v1's rank-1 seam); F5 d_dacc 0.5/0.5 ≥0.05 (decoder needs resolution, not any-tensor); F2/F3/F6/harness/precond clean both seeds. SCOPE: certifies resolved-FIELD FORMAT as causal carrier of held-out honorific binding beyond its rank-1 summary; χ hand-computed, so does NOT claim a trained parser pair — licenses the learned-duel stage next. Reached after 3 root-caused defects (device · CE-dilution · GF(2)-rank-4 parity metric-ceiling · convergence train-h004-py-{2,3} + build-honbind-multi-py-1)
source: Fable-5 research-gate under fable-mode (literature scan + one-variable lever + admissibility arithmetic), absorbed (state/h004_.../DESIGN_fable5_seed.md)

title: a LEARNED concord χ̂ = g(φᵢ,φⱼ) on the FIXED proxy-parser support reproduces the hand-computed field's causal power on held-out honorific binding — the field VALUES (signs), not just the format, can be trained; one variable = χ policy (hand χ vs learned χ̂), support held fixed
verdict: 🟡 2026-07-17 (free-slot d=384 ×2seed ×5arm). collect_verdict_g3a = WIRING FAILURE (precond: A-χ̂ drill 1.0/0.832, s1<0.95 — the tiny learned bilinear g fits its own drill UNSTABLY; wiring clean chi_grad+phi_frozen, A-hand rig fit 1.0/1.0). Substantive signal (needs no unstable seed): F1a passes (Δ 0.298/0.191 ≥0.15, F4/F5 clean) BUT F1a′ FAILS both incl the fit seed s0 (margin −0.176/−0.290): A-χ̂ 0.82/0.71 ≪ A-hand 1.0 = Fable's K3, the learned χ̂ cannot reproduce the hand concord at this scale (honest-limit a, G3-0d probe=1.0). DECISION: CONSOLIDATE AT G-2 — H_004's FIELD-FORMAT claim (🟢) stands; G3-a does not extend it; no re-run (fit-seed F1a′ fail excludes SUPPORTED). G3-b/H_006 (trained SUPPORT) gated behind a fresh research/feasibility gate.
